name: penumbra-rhino-studio-sphere
description: Penumbra Rhino Studio — standalone sphere insert (baseline sanity, no Grasshopper). Runs the plug-in command PenumbraSphere (pushes a sphere field, auto-fits), waits for a REAL converged frame, captures active.png. Pairs with penumbra-rhino-studio-gyroid: if the sphere renders+frames but the gyroid doesn't, the issue is gyroid-specific; if neither, it's the studio push/fit path.

setup.vlmDescription: A single smooth shaded orange/tan sphere centered and filling most of the Rhino viewport, lit with soft shading. NOT an empty grey viewport, NOT a lattice.
